'''Ieria''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Andaran system]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. It rivaled the wealthier planet [[Andara/Legends|Andara]] in production capability, but received nowhere near the income. The [[Ierian]]s did not enjoy indirect senatorial representation through Andara, and attempted an attack on Andara in [[26 BBY/Legends|26 BBY]].

{{Planet-stub}}
